'''鈭歱-j-p''' ('''kapajap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zhush|zhush]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zhush|zhush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-j-p
|-
! Lemma
| kapajap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajap|thipajap]] || [[word:jipajap|jipajap]] || [[word:shipajap|shipajap]] || [[word:kipajap|kipajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajap|thuthupajap]] || [[word:jujupajap|jujupajap]] || [[word:shushupajap|shushupajap]] || [[word:kukupajap|kukupajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupajap|thupajap]] || [[word:jupajap|jupajap]] || [[word:shupajap|shupajap]] || [[word:kupajap|kupajap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupajap|thupajap]] || [[word:jupajap|jupajap]] || [[word:shupajap|shupajap]] || [[word:kupajap|kupajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepajap|thepajap]] || [[word:jepajap|jepajap]] || [[word:shepajap|shepajap]] || [[word:kepajap|kepajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopajap|thothopajap]] || [[word:jojopajap|jojopajap]] || [[word:shoshopajap|shoshopajap]] || [[word:kokopajap|kokopajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajap|thopajap]] || [[word:jopajap|jopajap]] || [[word:shopajap|shopajap]] || [[word:kopajap|kopajap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajap|thopajap]] || [[word:jopajap|jopajap]] || [[word:shopajap|shopajap]] || [[word:kopajap|kopajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]] || [[word:pajap|pajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pajap|th忙pajap]] || [[word:j忙pajap|j忙pajap]] || [[word:sh忙pajap|sh忙pajap]] || [[word:k忙pajap|k忙pajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajap|thathapajap]] || [[word:jajapajap|jajapajap]] || [[word:shashapajap|shashapajap]] || [[word:kakapajap|kakapajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajap|thapajap]] || [[word:japajap|japajap]] || [[word:shapajap|shapajap]] || [[word:kapajap|kapajap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapajap|thapajap]] || [[word:japajap|japajap]] || [[word:shapajap|shapajap]] || [[word:kapajap|kapajap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapajap|shapajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapajap|goshapajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapajap|gokishapajap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapajapn眉|shapajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapajapnkn眉|goshapajapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajapn眉|gokishapajapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapajapsh毛|shapajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapajapnksh毛|goshapajapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapajapsh毛|gokishapajapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajapro|shapajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajapnkro|goshapajapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajapro|gokishapajapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajapmu|shapajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajapnkmu|goshapajapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajapmu|gokishapajapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapajapsher|shapajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapajapnksher|goshapajapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapajapsher|gokishapajapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapajapng|shapajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapajapnkng|goshapajapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapajapng|gokishapajapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapajapya|shapajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapajapnkya|goshapajapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapajapya|gokishapajapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapajapyam|shapajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapajapnkyam|goshapajapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapajapyam|gokishapajapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajapn眉sh毛|shapajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajapnkn眉sh毛|goshapajapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajapn眉sh毛|gokishapajapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajapn眉ro|shapajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajapnkn眉ro|goshapajapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajapn眉ro|gokishapajapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajapn眉mu|shapajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajapnkn眉mu|goshapajapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajapn眉mu|gokishapajapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajapsh毛n眉|shapajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajapnksh毛n眉|goshapajapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajapsh毛n眉|gokishapajapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajapsh毛ro|shapajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajapnksh毛ro|goshapajapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajapsh毛ro|gokishapajapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajapsh毛mu|shapajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajapnksh毛mu|goshapajapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajapsh毛mu|gokishapajapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajapron眉|shapajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajapnkron眉|goshapajapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajapron眉|gokishapajapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajaprosh毛|shapajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajapnkrosh毛|goshapajapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajaprosh毛|gokishapajaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajapromu|shapajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajapnkromu|goshapajapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajapromu|gokishapajapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajapmun眉|shapajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajapnkmun眉|goshapajapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajapmun眉|gokishapajapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajapmush毛|shapajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajapnkmush毛|goshapajapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajapmush毛|gokishapajapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajapmuro|shapajapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajapnkmuro|goshapajapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajapmuro|gokishapajapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
